botPolicy.title: Teams One-Tap Approval Policy
botPolicy.description: Configure which document types may be approved directly from a Teams card
botPolicy.howItWorksBody: Off (default, safer): the Teams card only shows an "Open to approve" deep link, and approval requires MFA inside myOPS. On: Approve/Reject buttons appear directly on the Teams card and act on one tap, bypassing MFA. Money documents can set an amount threshold so only items below it are one-tap.
botPolicy.docTypesDesc: Toggle Teams one-tap approval per document type
botPolicy.thresholdHelp: One-tap is allowed only when the document amount is below this threshold; leave blank for no limit.

shifts.description: Define flexible work shifts and assign them to employees; lateness is judged against the shift start time.

geofences.title: Clock-in Geofences
